titleStmt.title: SII 31.120: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 120. (A.R. No. B 195 of 1938.) ANIMELA, KAMALAPURAM TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up near the image of Gaṇēśa to the west of the village Animela.
This record is dated Śaka 1479, Pingaḷa, Kārttika śu. 11, corresponding to November 2, Tuesday, 1557 A.D.

Records the remission of taxes like Kānika, Kaṭnam, āsuvechham, dommari-pannu, sidhāyam, on barbers (mangaḷa-vōjulu) of Animela by Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Rāmarāju Tirumalrāju Ayyadēva mahārāju, while Sadāśivadēvarāya was ruling the country.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti . śrī jayābhyudaya śāli
vāhana śakha(ka)va¨rṣaṁbulu 1479 Agunēṭi pi
ṁgaḷa saṁvatsara kā¨rttika śu 11 lu śrīmanmahā
rājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpaśrī

vīra sadāsivarāyadēvamahārāyaluṁgāru vijaya
nagaramaṁdu pajraśiṁhvāsanārūḍhuḍaipṛdhrivisāṁmrāja
rājya(sāṁmrājyaṁ) śēyucuṁḍaṁgānu śrīmaṁnmahāmaṁḍalēśvara
rāmarāja tirumalrāju Ayyadēvamahā maṁ
gaḷavōjulaku Iccina dha¨rmaśāsanaṁ
sadāsi(śi)vadēva mahārāyalu ma
ṁgaḷa koṁḍōjuku rāyala si
lōnu maṁgaḷavōjarikālaku kaṭlālu Ā
suvecaṁ dommaripannu siddhāyaṁ
nyālugānu dha¨rmmaśāsanaṁ yici pra [A]
nimala maṁgaḷavōjalaku kānike kaṭnaṁ (do)
mmaripannu siddhāyaṁ mānyaṁsahāsarvamānyaṁgānu yisti
mi . Ācaṁdrā¨rka sthāyigānu Istimi . yiṁduku ye
vvaru tappinānu tamatalli taṁḍṟlanu vāraṇāśini kalu kō
śina pāpānabōduru gaṁggāvatilōnu gaṁgōvunu caṁpina pāpā
nabōduru . śuṇakamāṁsaṁ surasēviṁcina pāpānabōdu
ru .
Digital edition of SII 31.120 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
